title: Apple Rebuilt Siri With Google's AI. Tim Cook Called It Goodbye.
script: Tim Cook took the stage at Apple Park Monday for the last time as CEO — and he brought Google with him. Apple announced Siri will now be powered by a custom 1.2-trillion-parameter Google Gemini model, licensed at $1 billion per year. iOS 27 shipped in beta the same afternoon. Cook retires September 1. The man who built Apple into a $3 trillion company just handed Siri to a competitor to finish the job.
